text: I always loved this app, and everything about it. The look, the easy use interface and the speed in which it allows team members to work on one project simultaneously LIVE. But there are now so many bugs and crashes that I HATE the thought of using it. I have to close and reopen it every 6 minutes because it wont allow me to select a thing! Can't even zoom in or out. It freezes. TERRIBLE. THEYVE RUINED THE ENJOYMENT OF DESIGN.
author: Maddelyn Giddy

text: Canva Magic Media Ai is very bad. A lot of errors and bug. very laggg. Like low quality apps i ever use. I talk to canva team they cannot easliy fix the problem until now. I use only magic media. after i generate 10 images it was expire. after 15 days it will be back. no clarity how much points we can use in Magic Media. And very laggg when you make a create project. CANVA has a big problem on thier apps even in website. I dont recommend this app.
author: kickstunflash Radz

text: Great library of templates & elements, lacking search functionality. The main thing that prevents me from using Canva more often is the lack of advanced search functionality. It makes finding what I need—whether elements or templates—extremely time consuming. When designing something for business. I almost always need to find coordinating sets/collections of elements that will suit/cover a handful of specific themes or topics. The process of searching for individual elements, clicking to see if it’s part of a collection, then browsing that collection to see if it will meet my needs is an absur
author: slinkywhat

text: I’ve been a paying Canva subscriber for over five years, and until recently I relied on the platform regularly for both personal and professional work. Unfortunately, my recent experience with Canva support has been deeply disappointing and has fundamentally changed how I view the service. My account was used without my knowledge or consent by another person, who worked from inside my Canva account and involved a third party as a collaborator/owner on a document. When I discovered this, I tried to remove the document and revoke access, but found that I had no ability to do so. As a last resort, I hid the file. What followed was weeks of back-and-forth with multiple Canva support agents (at least five). Despite clearly explaining that I never received a link, never consented to the sharing,
author: Cam B

text: I have been using the Free version for a while and made a few designs which was saved in my profile. Recently I was asked by a paying member to join his team and assist with creating media. Today I'm trying to access my VIP designs such as my sons CV Resume to update and my husband business card from precious account, and they are all missing. This is terrible, I have created a small business logo and other documents I'd like to still use. WHERE ARE MY OLDER PROJECTS?!
author: Genevieve Wessels

text: I've had great experiences, however I'm currently having significant issues with elements not appearing in designs as they should and I cannot seem to contact canva to resolve this other than with their AI assistant which isn't helpful. I've reinstalled the app. I've tried it on different devices. I've just paid over $150 but I can't use it like I need to and I'm beginning to have serious regrets. I'm not usually the type to post negative reviews but it appears the team responds in this forum?
author: A. R. Allen

text: Paid user here. I do a lot of social media work so I use this app frequently. Capcut became pay to use, I wanted to try another video editing and photo editing software that has the ability to share projects with others. Upon recommendation I chose to use canva. The photo editing side is good, but using my money to access the video Worst. Mistake. Ever. the video editing software sucks, so buggy, you will not be able to export your video at all. it starts to export them the app just shuts down.
author: Joy

text: Hi, Developer Team of CANVA, everything is finely tuned in your App except one trouble which I have noticed several times while using your app on mobile... Actually, the problem is that the Canva page "SKIDS" here and there from the "Cursor Point" while editing any documents while in ZOOMED mode... In short, editing any "Text Document" by Zooming it very-very troublesome... So please look after this glitch and rectify it ASAP. Thanks.
author: RAJ Kumar

text: This app used to be very functual without much trouble, but now instead of auto-saving my designs, I have a 50/50 chance of my design being wiped when I leave the app. On top of that, it's quite buggy, slow, and I get locked out of my accounts if I haven't used the app in a while. I think my issues with this app would be subsided if instead of advertising that "canva auto-saves your design" it just added a save button. That's the more frustrating part of this
author: Angelique Devereux

text: I am improving at editing thanks to Canva. But as much as helpful it is, it is also as annoying. Right now, the app is responding so slow that it won't show me my creations when I was just editing a minute ago. Don't say it's within my connection because how would I be making my review right now? Please, fix this damn problem because I have a project to do. I can't believe I'm failing thanks to your app.
author: Rolando Sebastian

text: canva is an really very good app for youtuber and social media influencer, here can design everything whatever you want to design, also available pre-design templates and effects, I am using since last 2 Years. thanks 👍 team canva
author: Govardhan Sahu

text: bad experience,app does not work properly while preparing the presentation,lag problem while using the app,and it does not download any created work.
author: Vrushali Kadam

text: I really enjoy making reels and shorts using Canva pro. The recent updates were too difficult for me, but luckily my friend told me that it can be set back to the original program. My only issues with it are getting notifications that there are problems when I try to use the animate the image option causing me to not be able to use that option. It's also lagging a LOT. It's still my go to editing choice, but I wish it still ran smoothly and didn't have as many hiccups.
author: Teri G.

text: The app glitches when I try to make a comment on my students' work/projects. Very inconvenient... I have a Samsung Z Fold 5. You would think it would especially be compatible for such phone. UPDATE 12/25/25 Still not mobile friendly... 👎🏼 As I try to type or delete words, it selects other areas to edit. I give up. Now I have to hop on the computer for a simple Merry Christmas post on my non-profit's social media page.
author: Jason Morin

text: I LOVE IT!!! Few things to comment on tho. This app is awesome!! Though there’s a few things I wish it had…So, The videos are short and you only have a limited number to use. It makes me sad, because I really love making videos with this. So if you could maybe make the ability to make videos longer (maybe at least a minute?? Sometimes I put the videos I generate together to create things, but it’s kinda frustrating to wait for more videos every month, (I also wish that you could save your videos up and use them later without just being stuck with five no matter how many months you wait) that w
author: Zozozogsy

text: Don’t get the business cards. Canva isn’t a bad app, but their business cards are. I ordered some business cards and all of them were crooked, All of them were cut unevenly and none of them were aligned. I don’t understand how the production team cut these cards wrong saw that they were cut wrong box them, and then sent them. I ordered 500 business cards. I looked through all 500 and not one was card was good. All I can say if you’re gonna get business cards or even anything from the Canva shop, I recommend using a different brand or website.
author: edit_diamond

text: I upgraded to the Business plan specifically to use the Leonardo.ai integration, and it has been a total disaster. I’ve been locked out for 4 days due to a 'Callback error' loop that neither Canva nor their partner Leonardo.ai seems able to fix. What’s worse is the support: after days of waiting, I received a generic response from Canva asking me to 'clear cookies', showing they didn't even read the technical details of the 15-hour block I reported. I even changed my account email as a desperate move to fix it myself, and it still fails. Do not trust their 'Business' integrations if your workflow depends on them. They promote tools they cannot support technically. Total lack of professional response for a premium service.
author: Federico Villamil

text: Dear Canva team, I've noticed that both your app and web browser have been slow for the past couple of days. Initially, I thought it was a WiFi issue on my end, but after checking with friends, it seems to be a widespread issue. Could you please investigate? It's impacting our work productivity. Sincerely, varun.
author: Varun Kumar

text: If you are not paying premium, not only you don't get the features and most of all the graphic elements are exclusive, but also it works terrible. I paid the business plan, everything worked fluently and quickly. I ended the suscription, and suddenly the app does not connect to any wifi, it crashes, it takes ages to upload a document or open it to edit it, you have to close it and open it endless times before it ends up doing one task. Disgusting behaviour.
author: Valentina

text: Canva is soooo annoying and frustrating 😤😠 . To create a few seconds video takes hours. You have to wait for your videos to play. When you slice a play head, the video becomes worse. sometimes videos and icons don't even show. It's difficult to create a video of few seconds in record time. I have so many complaints... When it comes to deducting money, Canva is 💯 accurate. Right on time Fix this for crying out loud 📢
author: Chidi Young

text: For the love of all things simple, this app seriously needs to be easier to use. Figuring out the actual size of a document or image is such a pain because it doesn’t clearly show if it’s in inches, centimeters, or millimeters. Editing pictures is confusing, and creating a blank document is even worse. The app constantly forces templates on you, and I had to pick one and erase everything just to get a blank page. Then adjusting the sizes is another nightmare. why cant u make this simple?
author: james jason timbalaco

text: Let me start by saying I have used this app regularly for YEARS now. It's awesome. And I'd finally learned how to navigate starting the kind of file I want when y'all changed everything FOR THE WORSE. I do love the upload button. But I literally just spent ten minutes trying to figure out how to start a new project with a simple SQUARE workspace. And you can't know the shape of the options until you TRY an option, wasting more time. I gave up. Fix this please. It really shouldn't be this hard.
author: Shawn Bailey

text: No idea what is going on lately, if they decided to let their stupid AI write the code for this app as well, or whatever else was messed up, but both the app and web versions are completely unusable - never before have I had problems with so much lagging that moving one element takes 5 minutes, IF I am able to move it at all. I have several projects in canva which I want to work on but working on them is almost impossible due to this.
author: Markéta Butorová

text: Absolutely terrible experienc. Like loading screen is way to slow, When you accidentally pressed the home button it doesn't save your process laggy perfomance i cannot put text in my photo you name it I'm doing a school project and it took me 2 hours to finish it it literally lags every time i press the undo button it take like 15 whole seconds for it to clear up (DO NOT DOWNLOAD IN MOBILE Absolutely TERRIBLE)
author: Samuel Tenorio

text: What the hell happened? almost NOTHING good is free to use and locked behind the PRO or some sort of pass just to use it. A lot of options are locked, presentations can't show properly on TV and mobile, and I have difficulty with using presentation mode and it shows only a blank screen and not what I edited. honestly disappointing. this used to be my favorite presentation app
author: Aliah Elora

text: As much as I love this app, this bug hasn't been fixed yet and it's driving me nuts. I've been using canva for every presentation or performance task for school. When editing a presentation, text and elements are in place or where just the way i like it but when presenting the presentation, they were not aligned where I put them or the text format is wrong, I tried fixing it but i just made it worse which it's frustrates me. Please, Canva, fix it. It's been like forever, I'm waiting 😭😭
author: NoHardFeelings

text: Using this app on mobile is frustrating. Resizing elements is a nightmare. It's as if I need to be as precise as a mouse with every touch. Uploads fail often. Working on the move becomes more difficult than it needs to be. Terrible experience when starting designs from scratch.
author: Simphiwe Zulu (Don Phondeaux)

text: Canva on PC works great, Canva Mobile is TERRIBLE! Too many times now I've had projects completely disappear or be replaced with an image I never saved to that project. I clear the cache, I restart the app, I do everything they suggest. The projects are just simply gone. Paying for Canva Pro is an absolute waste of money until they can get the app working correctly.
author: Logan L

text: There are always bugs every time i edit with canva, EVERY. SINGLE. DAY. Fast response team just won't cut it to fix this, optimize your app
author: Arya Darmayali

text: The latest update is awful. The overlay function is not user-friendly on a phone. It makes everything more difficult to place, edit, and playback. I can't rewind my project to listen to the section I want without fighting the controls. Setting the timing for each item on the overlays is hard and I've ended up with white screens with only one of two elements on them and had to fight to get the element timing edited to the millisecond so the white screen will go away. That didn't happen before.
author: Marilynn Casida

text: been using this for a very very very long time now. i don't think i can live without it anymore😹 it's like my office now. thank you so much team! every add on you make makes it so much better! I wish I could design svgs in this 😹🐣is it too much to ask for?
author: adeela habeeb

text: The app is great, and I had an amazing experience using it. But lately, the app had been having a lot of bugs and took a long time to load even though my network and phone were working just fine. Sometimes, it even crashed when I was using it. Thankfully, it always saves my progress just in time, so none of my work ever disappears. It is just very annoying and a big inconvenience when I'm doing something very important and urgent. Please fix it. Thank you.
author: Fiolent

text: So I have been using Canva since it launched and this is my opinion on the app version. The app is just OK. It seems to work only when it wants to. It glitches out a lot when editing. The desktop version is great but I really wish the app functioned just as well when I'm on the go. It's not user friendly when editing larger projects from my tablet or phone. Canva as a whole is a great tool, the app however is a headache.
author: Amanda Lorz

text: I hate it now. Ever since the AI integration it’s getting harder and harder to edit photos. If I try to remove a mark off a wall but there are people in the photo it refuses to do it and tells me it can’t alter a person. The AI is so glitchy and judgmental it’s barely useable for editing. Yeah ok…I can make a cute birthday card with graphics but that’s about where it stops now. I’m so frustrated.
author: GinaRyan

text: they deleted my spanish assignment. Canva lost my assignment the day I had a Spanish presentation. I went through everything all of my account accounts every single tab to find your work and I could not find it and this makes me not want to use Canva anymore because of how it didn’t save and how it’s very disappointing I will remember this and I will keep this in mind. The next time I use this app.
author: can be better reviews

text: Bugs. All of a sudden app is acting weird and not saving projects to files on IOS and I can't find a work around
author: Trishbry

text: worth it. It takes a longer time than it should to get acclimated to how to work in Canva. It’s so much way better than word processors, etc. I wish I could turn off all AI functions, because AI is not allowed at my workplace, so I sometimes get in trouble for using Canva. I wish they wouldn’t mix together templates/items that are premium with those that are free.
author: ElysseMaven

text: Working in Canva Pro. Having difficulty transitioning the parish bulletin to Canva Pro. Shape boxes/text boxes all very confusing. Nothing has been easy. Feels like two steps forward and one back at every turn.
author: Olorstl

text: The Canva customer service team are brilliant. We had a few issues with our designs - the response time via email was really fast, and the guys we liaised with were really helpful, running checks with the designers and giving feedback on proposed designs, prior to production.
author: Mr Dan Plosky

text: Canva manages to be both overpriced and underwhelming, which is honestly impressive in the worst possible way. For a platform that charges a premium, the actual value delivered is laughably thin. Most of the “features” are either half-baked, locked behind yet another paywall, or so unreliable that using them feels like a gamble. Things randomly don’t load, exports fail, designs glitch, and tools behave differently from one session to the next. You spend more time fighting the platform than creating anything. And let’s talk about pricing. The cost would maybe be defensible if the product worked consistently or offered genuinely powerful functionality. It doesn’t. You’re paying top-tier prices for a bloated interface full of filler assets and recycled templates, while basic things you actual
author: Elliot

text: Not sure if this is an Android issue, but nothing works on this app anymoe I can't upload any photos from any of my galleries to make a collage of any sort, And when I finally get/find the right file, It says it's not uploading to Canva and is invalid. This has been an issue since last year and it's never been fixed. I pay for this app for my business to make flyers, card designs, and even templates and is nearly becoming impossible to use. I can't even make video edits for socials
author: Dan Santiago

text: Canva itself is fine but the app is so jumpy because it constantly wants to decide for you what you want to do. If I have a blank project, it jumps to templates. If I'm editing something it pops up different options. Constantly popping up things like an assistant that's too eager to help out. I know how and what to click on when I need it, I don't need the app to tell me what to do. Also super annoyed the constant pushing of gen AI. Tempted to leave cause of that...
author: Anjelica H

text: As of the last couple months it has sucked. I constantly need to close down the app because it's not working correctly or is "losing connection" even though there's nothing wrong with my internet or any other app that I'm using. It's frustrating & takes way longer to do anything. Now it's not even saving my work correctly & is completely changing it on its own! Hours of time just wasted. Mind you, I pay for this too. 🙄 Maybe not for long if this keeps up. Used to be amazing, what happened??
author: Angel Gulick

text: I'm so incredibly disappointed. I'm a pro subscriber and I've used Canva for over a year almost daily. I've made hundreds of designs. The latest update has completely changed the way Canva works. SO SO SLOW!!!!!! Crashes constantly, freezes, the video editing (which I use extensively) is basically unusable unless I use my old files and make copies so I don't use the new interface. I've contacted customer service but almost nothing has resolved. I'm so close to canceling my pro subscription.
author: Beatriz Jarvis

text: This editing app is very useful for me as a high school student. I get to finish my projects on time, but not all the time. I have some major problems with the app. When I open the app and while the app is loading, it keeps on popping something that says I have to reconnect with my wifi connection and check it. But my wifi status was working really well and I didn't even have a problem with it. Because of this, I had to re-install the app and log in again. I hope this issue will be fixed asap!!!
author: Tyrone Germane Guevarra

text: I've been using for a while now but recently I've been experiencing serious glitches. videos do not get downloaded at all no matter how much i try for hrs. the app has gotten slower. everything load for hrs and its frustrating to wait for it to load. I've decided to switch to other designing apps. takes too long to save anything
author: Sadia Rooman

text: Edited: I love canva so much!!! I teach literally all my teachers how to use it and special effects you can use on presentations, documents, sites, and more! All of my friends know that usually when I'm not doing something I'm going to be on canva! I just absolutely hate that you can't create when you're offline, only if you have downloaded designs, but other than that, CANVA IS AN AMAZING APP!!!!! I will encourage everybody to download it!!
author: Brenlee Kinnamon

text: it's hard to understand the flow but it's amazing how many choices and how badass and just awesome looking everything ends up being you can't go wrong there's all kinds of choices and and creative stuff and templates and just everything I was overwhelmed almost by how many choices it's not easy to use right away but it's badass good quality stuff
author: Jerald Williams

text: Used to love it but somehow there were errors everytime I design on the web and opened it in mobile. The fonts size were different, alignment changed, so I had to do adjustment before downloading the design. Please fix this. It has been months and it's just annoying. UPDATE : Everything is now top tier! However I hope the AI will get better soon because it's a bit time consuming to refresh the result of the wanted prompt.
author: Patricia Herdita

text: it had a chance genuinely but its terrible, i had high hopes, everyone uses it and praises it but when i try it, it summons demons, i erase text? , it replaces them with more text, selecting where to type? nah it just moves when it feels like it, it was genuinely terrible, i cant just make a simple plain document without suffering on a single line trying to just type words, pathetic, aims for the purpose of asthetic and ease but cannot accomplish such a simple interface of a document creator,
author: Aeronn Guacin

text: there wasn't a zero star option or else I will put a zero whenever I click on the project it always duplicates the video the animation which have created always duplicates it was 44 seconds animation now it's 20 minutes animation very bad app do not download this app I spent 4 hours working on animation and I can't even delete very bad app
author: Ram Ganguly

text: The app is great and all but, I've encountered a glitch, wherein my audio to my ppt keeps repeating in an echoey annoying unintended way in each slide, I've searched tutorials and it still havent been removed, and even if I delete the audio, the sound is still there, I have a report tomorrow and I can't finish it because of that. Pls fix it and thank you!
author: Zaijan Espiritu

text: A bit difficult to figure out how to use, but overall a good quality app with no ads. Free to upload and download, I haven't noticed any limitations on that. I also haven't reached a limit yet for AI generations. Some features require a subscription, but some work arounds can solve issues like resizing when downloading, ect. Something frustrating is the AI feature does not follow prompts well. Overall, a pretty good app.
author: Laurie R

text: Was great. The AI has wrecked it. I don't want AI to 'write it for me' when the pop up gets in the way and still NO spell check?! since all the AI updates it's slow and laggy. Has some great features but there's been no development to the actual design tools, just the AI which is not what I wanted from the app. when you open it, it no longer takes you to your projects but to their AI templates. I have to use a different app to make a basic photo collage now. Cancelling my pro subscription.
author: Willant Sunshine

text: I love the app with all the amazing features. But, I have a problem with the audio I add to my videos. Everytime I try to go into my project I created, Canva kicks me out and asks me to reload and that I must check my internet connection, but my connection is stable. I need to create videos with audio for Udemy and my video is 15 minutes long, but now I can't do it. Even on the webpage I am being kicked out. Can Canva please fix the issue, because I am creating videos on my phone. Thanks.
author: Chan Pro

text: the app sucks. I was in the middle of simply uploading an mp3 and adding photos to it and when I changed a picture it erased it all and now only gives me 8 seconds of the song no matter what I try doing. the app sucks. I have used AI to try and fix the problem but it just doesn't do anything different. no matter the template I pick or the song or anything it only gives 8 seconds. won't use or recommend ever.
author: Regan White

text: I absolutely love Canva but it seems to become less mobile friendly with every update. Lately it is has been slow and patchy on my app, I am struggling to highlight text and once it is highlighted as soon as I change from lowercase to uppercase it either changes the text colour or the highlighted part isn't highlighted anymore. When I zoom in on a specific part it will direct to another part of the page as well. At times I even struggle to swipe between pages. I do have the latest version.
author: Este Burger

text: Feature and functionality break is so common and annoying. Here is the problem I am facing. I go to Photos app->collection->WhatsApp images and then share an image with Canva and choose Upload. it used to work till about 2 weeks back but now it doesn't. That's so annoying. I am so used to edit and upload image this way.
author: Shreyas Majithia

text: I do like the creative projects I can produce with Canva. However, I don't like that there's no way to access anyone for help. Since the recent updates, my videos have been glitchy when I post them but I can't figure out how to fix it.
author: Sharika Boddie

text: Using around more than a year. Very simple and one place for all my needs. Recently I couldn't download videos and can't even open files. Tried many months but still can't find why. All my projects are in the middle of the line, and I couldn't finish them on time. Canva loses my hope.
author: Sathya M

text: I did give this app 5 stars before. I am on Pro and I am getting fed up with the fact that they are constantly changing things that were fine and are now worse. Stop messing with it. I prefer to use the app on my phone & now it keeps glitching. only change things if it will improve otherwise leave it alone & work on something else please🤯🤭😝
author: Serena A

text: So basically, it looks like the app is having issues. Please fix these bugs. My graphics are being squished down. As of March 4, 2026, Canva's official status indicates that all systems are operational, with no major widespread outages reported today. However, users frequently report persistent "micro-bugs" and glitches related to specific features, such as downloading designs with uploaded images, video editing sync issues, and UI unresponsiveness
author: Karen Bush

text: This is extremely frustrating. The separate file download option is gone, so I can’t export individual clips from one project anymore. That was a basic and very useful feature. Recent updates have made video editing slower and more complicated. Earlier, adjusting clip duration was quick and simple. Now every clip has to be clicked and edited one by one, which completely slows down the workflow. Canva was known for being simple and beginner-friendly. These changes have made it harder.
author: Subhajit Bhattacharyya

text: a very good app for my project front pg . as I do . a little problem is that only it have less template. if there were more templates designs it were a little good.
author: White メdragon

text: Terrible app, corrupted my work, constantly crashing, tried on several devices. There are better alternatives elsewhere. I recommend you to skip it.
author: Igor Feher

text: This app is absolutely useless. Even after purchasing a Pro membership, it doesn't work for the purpose it was downloaded for, and even the AI version is useless.
author: Bhupender Singh

text: there annoying bug. i was typing word in Noted copy it to Canva app for my home work. I paste it and turn out the word I typing got reduce I try over over paste it paste it is always got reduce many time pls fix this annoying bug ever
author: Pito Zamora

text: DO NOT SUBSCRIBE TO THIS APP EVER! I’ve been trying to generate images for the past 3 days and it keeps failing every single time. This is extremely frustrating, especially since i’m a canva business subscriber. A paid service should not have such persistent issues. At this point the feature is basically unusable. Very disappointing.
author: Usamah Dina

text: Freezes ALOT. All of the functions do not work all of the time. I don't think the developers anticipated this high volume of users. For instance, I have been trying to use the "Show Timing " feature on my project for about an hour now. It is not working at all. I select the function, and it does nothing Update: its glitchy now when I try to use the more (3 dot) feature for my designs.
author: Stephonia Bush

text: I can't able to download my project. it's taking too much amount of my mobile data. my video is just 10 seconds, but when I tried to export it, it took 1.5gb data and still exporting did not finished yet. what is happening? this is really frustrating
author: Jeyakumar

text: what's the point of giving soany function when none of them work. waste app,too slow, does not load anything, after multiple attempts does not add any element or photo. 👎🏻i don't care about your help and support it won't work either.
author: Vinay Prajapati

text: I'm absolutely flabbergasted by the poor interface of this app. Much of it is unintuitive but even when you figure things out they make no sense. Even word processing apps work with shapes and objects better than canva. I got a subscription because i liked the templates but if you want to do anything your own you're out of luck. I've been a graphic designer for 20 years and this app is one of the worst.
author: Rebecca Flaum

text: I've been using Canva for years. I think overall, I find it very useful. When I need to generate social media content, its my one stop shop. When I need to create more detailed work, its my first stop, I'll suss out ideas, then move over to illustrator & finish. Occasionally glitches will crop up, but I understand sometimes thats par for the course. I'd love it if 2 things were fixed: there are no nudge buttons in the app on my android tab & the glitch when applying animation to groups - please!
author: Audio

text: Voice is getting broken and coarse while saving a video. Even subscribing to the app is not resolving the issue. The bug is horrible as you just cannot get a good video with proper voice even after a lot of effort. Bug needs resolution asap.
author: Shobhana Singh Chouhan

text: IT IS GOOD but it annoys me always, it always tests my patience, it always crashes out it always lag, and it can't even do a proper copy paste, also i dont have a problem of it having a vip subscription but please can you make a selection button for free sticker ONLY
author: Moon Stars

text: 2/26 APP NOT WORKIN RIGHT AGAIN. CANT DOWNLOAD PROJECTS. KEEPING ME FROM ADVERTISE 11/2025 can't freaking download my project for work AGAIN!!!!! /16/25 once again this freaking app isn't working. cant add video clips to my item im creating! cant open the got damn app again. what are yall doing?Canva is corrupt again! my videos are dragging to 1/3 actual speed!! CAN'T I EDIT THE LENGTH OF THE VIDEOS ADDED ?From April until now it was working great! This new update is HORRIBLE!!!
author: cicicure88

text: Doesn't work, I have 6%and I have to charge my phone, away from home, have something important to do, I have lots of wifi, internet and data, but it refuses to upload my picture. I always recommend canva, but now disappointment. I am mad.
author: murendeni netshivhambe

text: This app used to be amazing with good templates. Now it crashes and lags to where its just unusable. I restarted my phone, closed my apps, and cache. If everyone is having the same issues, its obviously not the phone
author: allycat365

text: Amazing This app has been the answer to all my problems. It is helpful for my small business. It has everything from cute social media posts, digital products, flyers, etc. You can make any kind of document, excel sheet, planners, mental health journal entries, business cards, presentations, video editing, travel itineraries- the possibilities are endless. It also has the cutest graphics. It's extremely easy to use, and can conveniently work from my phone or my laptop.
author: Samantha Ledesma

text: While Canva has always been my favorite and is still my go-to app, I find myself increasingly frustrated with all the new bugs. Whenever I try to upload an image, 9/10 times, it just goes black and resets. Now it just freezes up no matter what I'm doing. Clearing my cache does nothing other than maybe speed it up a bit and reduce (but not eliminate) the lagging. I am really disappointed because now it's unusable on my phone.
author: Marlena Baker

text: Canva can make any media you want, infused with AI. It's still hard to control (Dec 2025) because the AI takes over when you want to retain manual control. Also, the controls are not responsive to your design. Still, there's everything here... it's just a matter of learning how to control it. It's worth a subscription that gives you access to premium features like backgrounds and branding. I can see this for real commercial project... once I figure it out. ChatGPT has a Canva assistant
author: Steve Royster

text: It's a Very Good app. Everything is in there but, There is some Glitch or Bug that I'm facing. 1) When I copy something in Arabic then paste on Canva It's always showes Wrong Latters. 2)When Animate any Numbers, the numbers aren’t show in 1 line. it divide in another line.. Please Fix these Annoying problem
author: RS Rahmatullah

text: Good for ppt and printing but despite my device in optimal condition, it's just so buggy. One time I wanted to resize an element, can't zoom in on my ppt anymore and need to restart. Sometimes, it just freezes. And despite my stable network speed, it takes too long to load and even freezes up when I just tap at something. And I know that when putting too many elements, it's bound to slow down, but when I haven't put anything on it yet or not that many?
author: Mary Grace Egaran

text: You cannot use this app without providing a non-temporary email. I created a new Microsoft acct for this. It required me to give permission to view the microsoft profile. I did, but apparently there wasn't enough personal information to sell, so it rejected it. SHORT VERSION: THIS WILL SELL YOUR INFO AND GIVE YOUR AN ERROR MESSAGE IF THERE ISN'T ENOUGH INFORMATION IN YOUR PROFILE.

text: i didnt use every features of canva but often use it for creating post and videos. only 1 difficulty i felt while editing videos is trim videos. it just very difficult. few more small things too. will review again if i will use it totally and feel any issue or things to praise about. canva is good going for everyone 👍

text: Can't save to files. It's not letting me save my assignment to files and it is EXTREMELY frustrating! The menu options are different now
author: Taignghjhgbn

text: Honestly Canva is great for what it is, I use it almost daily for social posts and quick stuff for clients. Only thing that bugs me is when you pick a template and halfway through realize half the elements are premium, feels a bit bait and switchy. But yeah, solid 4 stars, wouldn't go back to struggling with Photoshop for basic stuff.
author: Jurre van der Veen

text: Downloads great on the phone but the app preforms terrible(scrolls to page 1 at random times, freezes, etc.). Download is terrible on the computer but preforms great with no issues. 3 stars because this was not always a problem. Work flow is interrupted constantly when on the phone and on the go. I have to back out of designs and come back in to make the next edit, sometimes even restart the app.
author: Psalm150

text: Absolutely trash navigation of a project. Can't scroll side to side, can't rotate to landscape without using an app that forced every app to rotate. Can't turn off bold or italics or underline and make a punctuation mark or it reactivate. Can't scroll left or right on a text box. Can't scroll all the way left or right on the project slide. EDIT: Devs reached out and that alone is worth raising my review. I'll be keeping an eye on this. Canva as a service is a fantastic piece of software on PC.
author: Battle Rabbit

text: using this app for a very long time and it's always been great but for some reason, today when I opened its not loading my projects and not letting me create new ones. the pop up says there was an error on our side. I tried restarting the app multiple times but nothing is working. I don't know what went wrong. please do look into it.
author: Bhoomi Patel

text: Canva used to be amazing. Now it's not fun to use it. There's always and I mean ALWAYS a glitch in audio when saving the video to mp4. Most people may not hear it but I hear it. Also changing background used to be one click away, when using canva on computer, nope not anymore smh. Still work on phone though. Within the app but not from computer. I think I'll stop paying for this app. Sorry canva you used to be so great! What happened. If it ain't broke don't "'fix" it. You used to be AMAZING.
author: Robert Englund

text: It feels like a headache file managing and the app isn't very mobile friendly. You can't even sort all your files and when you sort files that are in a folder, it will not sort files out properly if they are numbered with the same name. I can't select all without also grabbing the title too. I hate having to spend extra money to use one feature and to get other canvasses. I resorted to just using easier programs and just using my notes app.

text: Ive been using canva for years but this is really annoying lately. theres an error about checking internet connections BUT it only happens to your app. other editing tools, uploading from social media and downloading stuff is okay. our internet is fast. hoping you get this fix. uninstalled & installed but the error still persist. cant even edit coz it wont allow me to login due to error. uninstall for now. til its fixed, im using other editing tools. sorry!

text: It's overrated. OVERHYPED. It designed a logo for me, but said it couldn't change the text unless I upgraded. So I did, and it STILL wouldn't change the text. Told me to logout and check for updates and it STILL won't change the text! Disappointing. I expected more!

text: Signed up for 1 year Pro subscription in September 2025. By January, I suddenly couldn’t access any of the Pro features I was paying for. text: This is the best app. I have used this for making my YouTube thumbnails, YouTube channel stuff (Channel profile, channel banner, etc) and it works like a breeze. it's easy to use unlike other apps. I don't think I have seen a single ad either when I have used this app. 10/10 recommend to people who need to make thumbnails without annoying pop-up ads

text: This app used to be great. Smooth, easy to use, everything. But lately, after the other updates, the app and the web has been lagging and crashing nonstop. Though sometimes I try to think of other reasons that might be causing it, like the WiFi and all, but after so many months, I really think it's just the app. It's great that the app is improving with updates, but I hope we can get rid of the lag.

text: I want to start by saying I enjoy using Canva, but if you ever need support - specifically related to a security issue (losing access to account due to compromised account), don't expect intelligent or speedy assistance. I am a Canva Pro account holder, and I am 4 days in to the issue and they still are "investigating" and account is still being accessed by the hacker! It is more than obvious the account has been hacked, but apparently their support bots (no way it is real humans) can't understand normal thinking. I most likely will be cancelling my Pro account and utilizing other tools. This is over the top horrible!
author: KK Gem
